first_obstacle_label: {minigolf_cue_rule_text} Which labeled obstacle will the ball hit first?
{minigolf_cue_rule_text} What is the label of the first obstacle on that line?
{minigolf_cue_rule_text} Report the label on the obstacle reached before any other obstacle.
The ball follows the dashed cue direction. Which labeled obstacle is hit first?
{minigolf_cue_rule_text} Identify the first labeled obstacle the ball would reach.
shot_path_label: {minigolf_bank_rule_text} Which numbered shot cue would reach the hole without hitting an obstacle first?
Compare the numbered starting cues. {minigolf_bank_rule_text} Which shot number reaches the hole?
{minigolf_bank_rule_text} Report the number of the cue whose putt reaches the hole.
Each numbered cue shows a starting direction. {minigolf_bank_rule_text} Which cue should be selected to reach the hole?
{minigolf_bank_rule_text} Identify the numbered shot that reaches the hole before any obstacle.

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_putting_course: a mini-golf putting course with a ball, a hole, visible obstacles, and any shown shot cues
code_prompt_defaults.minigolf_cue_rule_text: The dashed cue shows the starting direction of the putt; extend it as a straight line.
code_prompt_defaults.minigolf_bank_rule_text: A shot travels straight and bounces off course walls like a mirror before continuing.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_first_obstacle_label: set "annotation" to one [x, y] pixel point at the center of the first labeled obstacle hit by the extended cue
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_first_obstacle_label: set "answer" to the selected obstacle label as a string
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_shot_path_label: set "annotation" to one path segment using two pixel-point endpoints [x, y] in [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]] form, matching the endpoints of the selected visible dashed cue from the ball outward
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_shot_path_label: set "answer" to the selected numbered shot label as a string
